reviews.review_description: Hail Satan!

reviews.review_title: Great app, wish for logistical upgrades
reviews.review_description: Great app, just wish I could reset/re-center the screen, that feature doesn’t seem to work. And you have to look at what you’re clicking you can’t use the remote standalone, I wish you could have that option

developer_response.body: I'll have a look at recenter and using the remote to better effect

reviews.review_description: Greatly enjoyed encountering the bible in these natural settings. The different experiences of listening to readings, exploring natural environments and tranquil music make this a really unique way to experience God.
Great app. Well done. I'd like to attend VR church that it offers but cannot find the portal and service times!

developer_response.body: Hi, D.J. Soto runs a full social service using the Altspace VR app, checkout http://www.vrchurch.com

reviews.review_description: Really glad I downloaded this app. Fully immersive and beautifully done. Only thing it needs is a church to visit on one of the islands. Imagine kneeling before the cross in a vr rendered church. Hope it can be done. Also it would be nice when showing the pages of the Bible that rather than big screens in front of us could it not be a book as if in the hands of the user. Does that make sense? Keep up the good work. Blessings

developer_response.body: Thank you, some initial ideas are being tested to see if something like this can be dome well

reviews.review_description: What a great idea to allow VR users to get away, relax and read the Bible. The app does need an update, though. When trying to click on ‘UI’ or ‘text speed’, nothing happens. Also, even if you don’t go in to try and adjust those settings, all you can do is click on a location and that scripture is there, but doesn’t do anything. Also, the huge menu screen doesn’t minimize or disappear so you can get the immersion to really relax and read in the environment.

developer_response.body: This should all be fixed for you now in version 7.1

reviews.review_description: Great app, has all the Bible and some extras, nice getaway :)
Is a blessing that can be expanded to another languages...im willing to pay for a more complete version

developer_response.body: Thank you, I have added "Santa Biblia — Reina Valera 1909" inside the app for free

reviews.review_description: I was just curious if this is the king James version of the bible?

developer_response.body: The app now supports multiple Bible versions. The defualt is World English Bible; but you can swap to King James if you like, and there is also a Spanish version.

reviews.review_description: Taking time in my day to feed my spirit is very important, but there are so many distractions. This vr experience immerses you in nature and music to help you focus on certain passages in Psalms. I love it and can't wait to see more content added!
I don't like being in the air. I would love to sit on the ground reading GODS word.

developer_response.body: Whether it is on the ground or in the air, have a great time reading God's word. I experimented with placing the user on the ground for some of the scenes for you; but to no avail since their head needed to be arched up to read the psalms. Never the less in the next experience of the beatitudes there are some scenes where the user is much closer to the ground.

reviews.review_description: Thanks for being true to God and His Word.Praise Jesus my Lord and Savior.

developer_response.body: You can now experience two passages as requested

reviews.review_title: It is a blessing to have apps like this
reviews.review_description:
Be able to enjoy growing in Christ, 
God bless who ever made this app. Please bring more apps like this one

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words, we are thinking about real Church and Worship experiences in VR right now

reviews.review_description: Feels like a cheap attempt to appeal to appeal to Christians. Floating bannets of a single psalm. The environment doesn't even fit the actual Psalm.

developer_response.body: I'm sorry you didn't leave the app feeling blessed, I hope you have a great week and that find something else to your liking. For reference: you should find there are 5 psalms and 8 beatitudes here, rather than a single psalm.

reviews.review_description: A refreshing break from the norm, with encouraging psalms and tranquil setting

I was so happy when I saw this app in the store. As a practicing Catholic, I had never thought of VR as a tool for prayer, but I downloaded it with visions of sitting with the Virgin Mary (something like the stunning app Art Plunge) and saying the rosary. 

In my humble opinion, I appreciate VR apps that don't abuse VR just because it's there. I prefer to sit quietly, look straight ahead and do my thing (of course if I'm smashing glass panes I expect twists and turns).  

When you first go into to the app there is a large papyrus with instructions in all caps. Anyone in marketing knows that all caps are difficult to read, but the sign is much too close to the eyes, causing strain. I keep looking forward, trying to find what to do next until in crane my neck over my right shoulder. Oh great. There was much more material behind me, so I had to stand up gingerly and turn around. I don't have a controller so rather than deal with it, I've uninstalled it. 

Of what was seen, it seems nice. There is a guitar on the ground on which you can change the music and if I may make a suggestion, Taizé music is exceptionally well suited for prayer. 

I wish the developers the best of luck for the future.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback, many of the changes suggested have made it into the latest update

reviews.review_title: Nice app to relax and pray with
reviews.review_description:
This is a decent app for those looking for something religious, not much else available. I appreciate the developers making this app. It does need some work though.

I think 360 is good for some apps but doesn't work too well here. Maybe there is a setting to change layouts I dunno, but to have to rotate around to read everything is awkward. I also found changing scenes really annoying. Would help if there was a picture on each stone to know what environment you could switch to. Also the guitar didn't seem to work right in at least one of the scenes.

It's still a cool app, like others said it would be nice to have the whole bible, instead of the same passages every time you load it up. A bible with a yearly reading plan and daily passage would be nice. I have a bible app on my phone that keeps me using the app each day, would be nice to use this VR app in a similar way. I'd also enjoy some church scenery in addition to outdoor ones.

developer_response.body: Thanks Tony, the latest update has many of the features you have asked for. Thanks for the feedback and I hope you enjoy all the latest new features!

reviews.review_description:
And Love for 1,49 €

OMG !!!

I'm out.

For the Bible reading you have to create a way to turn off the sound effects. The sound effects were so annoying i couldnt finish a chapter. Also why not just make a paid version with an audio reader for the Bible. The graphics were fine, the words were large, the idea of the meditation was fine. But please fix this issue if you can.


Update May 2nd, 2019 - So you, the developer, send me a very insulting comment privately and publicly comment about money problems.  All I suggested was that you to create a button to turn off a sound.  Now that you have revealed what kind of spirit is really behind this app, don't worry about any further "whining" from me.

developer_response.body: You can turn the sound off by selecting ambience only on the music settings. The Spirit behind this app was to give you a free way to enjoy personal time with God.

reviews.review_description: I can't install the app .it says install failed . What can I do . It's not a storage problem because I downloaded other games after it did this .

developer_response.body: Best thing to do is to email support@theshapeofsound.com and we can see if we can sort this out.
